description: First people out of the wrecked ark; they claim Apsyntion, not Earth, as home. Semi-nomadic clans live beside Lilin hives, coaxing food and oxygen from the fungal mat while oral tradition hides Wormwood’s grave—Wind Cathedrals on the cliffs echo hive-song at dawn and dusk.

cards.name: Anemoi
cards.card_effect: Resilient (Restore one health from the Creche during your growth phase.)
cards.flavor_text: Buffeted, tossed about, skin carved from storms that rage all their lives. Wormwood has hewn men from stone.

cards.name: Apsyntion Communication
cards.card_effect: Draw a card, then draw a card for each Xeno in play.
cards.flavor_text:
<are you the song or the singer>
-First recording from Promethea probe

cards.name: Apsyntion Symbiosis
cards.card_effect: Target faction’s units each gain Consume (If this unit deals lethal combat damage, add one health from the defeated unit.)
cards.flavor_text: Ranna no longer felt ill when the spores drifted upwards, no longer dizzy from the song of the world.

cards.name: Behemoth
cards.card_effect: Consume (If this unit deals lethal combat damage, add one health from the defeated unit.)
cards.flavor_text: The behemoth is more like a force of nature than a living thing, and what man would choose to fight a hurricane?

cards.name: Borespikes
cards.card_effect: This unit gains +1 Armor and Pierce (This unit ignores Armor when in combat.)
cards.flavor_text: A borespike might look like a tusk or a thorn to a layman, but a rose can’t chew its way through composite armor.

cards.name: Boreworm
cards.card_effect: Consume (If this unit deals lethal combat damage, add one health from the defeated unit.)
cards.flavor_text:
We’re looking at Eden’s defense system. Who are we to spit in the face of God?
-Vergil, Brood Handler

cards.name: Brood Den
cards.card_effect: D➤ When you remove a D from this facility, you may add it to a target Xeno unit.
cards.flavor_text: Lilin Matrons die protecting their final clutch — a first meal for the last born.

cards.name: Brood Handlers
cards.card_effect: Adjacent Xenos gain +1 Attack, and may restore 1 health from the Creche during your upkeep.
cards.flavor_text:
<your song is our song. the others must now be silent>
-End of Promethea Probe logs

cards.name: Bury
cards.card_effect: Move target unit to the back of any lane its owner controls. While this reflex is active, this unit gets -1 Attack and +1 Armor.

cards.name: Chrysalis
cards.card_effect:
Add one D to this unit from the Creche during your growth phase.
If Chrysalis has 4 health, you may scrap and replace it with a Xeno from your hand. It gains all health from Chrysalis.

cards.name: Contact
cards.card_effect: Draw a card. If it is a unit, you may add it to the front of a lane you control with 1 health added from the Creche. If not, return it to the top of the deck.
cards.flavor_text:
My fingers brushed chitin and I heard the planet speak.
-Ranna Myran, Promethea Probe Team

cards.name: Flock Webs
cards.card_effect:
This unit is Slow (If this unit takes lethal combat damage, it does not deal damage in return.)
If this unit deals combat damage to a unit, this card becomes attached to that unit.

cards.name: Fungus Farm
cards.card_effect: D: Add 1 D to this card from the Creche.
cards.flavor_text: Lilin biostructures are complex neural weaves. A fungus farmer is as much an agriculturist as he is a psychiatrist.

cards.name: Harlequin
cards.card_effect: Cloak (When attacking, may ignore the first unit in the enemy lane. In a breach, this unit always uses its full Attack value.)
cards.flavor_text: Chromatophores in the skin give the harlequin impeccable camouflage.

cards.name: Incursion
cards.card_effect: Target unit gains +1 Attack, +1 Armor and Cloak (When attacking, may ignore the first unit in the enemy lane. In a breach, this unit always uses its full Attack value.)

cards.name: Lilin Hive
cards.card_effect:
If a unit you control loses health, you may place the token here instead of scrapping it. You cannot remove tokens from this card. 
For every 4 citizens here, units you control do +1 combat damage.

cards.name: Lilin Matron
cards.card_effect:
Add one health from the Crèche during your upkeep.
Squad (This unit gets +1 Attack for every health on it.)
cards.flavor_text: Her children are legion.

cards.name: Lilin Vultures
cards.card_effect:
If any unit is scrapped, you may add a health to this unit from the Creche.
Squad (This unit gets +1 Attack for every health on it.)

cards.name: Mark Of The Hive
cards.card_effect: Any citizens on this facility are lost during that player’s growth phase.
cards.flavor_text: There was no gnashing of teeth - this was something so alien it could not hate.

cards.name: Mimetic Scales
cards.card_effect: This unit gains Cloak (When attacking, may ignore the first unit in the enemy lane. In a breach, this unit always uses its full Attack value.).
cards.flavor_text: He startles, and his skin shifts in tone and texture, as his thoughts betray his camouflage.

cards.name: Musk Herders
cards.card_effect:
Resilient (Restore one health from the Creche during your growth phase.)
If this unit is at full health, you gain +1 T during your growth phase.
cards.flavor_text: Herdsmen returning with a full flock are heroes for a day.

cards.name: Shroud
cards.card_effect: Airborne (Each airborne unit may move during your move phase)
cards.flavor_text: The real terror is behind you, when the second shroud blocks out the sun.

cards.name: Spawning Pits
cards.card_effect: D: Restore 1 health to a unit you control from the Creche.
cards.flavor_text: Neuroplastic fungal mats remarkably similar to our own creche tech - a fractal bridge between our species.

cards.name: Spore Weevils
cards.card_effect: Squad (This unit gets +1 Attack for every health on it.)
cards.flavor_text: A blight of weevils knows only hunger.

cards.name: Sporemask Poachers
cards.card_effect: Consume (If this unit deals lethal combat damage, add one health from the defeated unit.)
cards.flavor_text: Poachers only need a few moments in the mist to fill a sac with a month’s salary.

cards.name: Wind Cathedral
cards.card_effect: During their upkeep, each opponent must move a D from their Citadel to this facility, if they can.
cards.flavor_text:
When the planet sang, we listened and learned. This is their Voice, and it calls to all humanity.
-Cult Bishop Neroma

cards.name: Windlion
cards.card_effect:
Slow (If this unit takes lethal combat damage, it does not deal damage in return.)
This unit gains +1 Attack for each point of health below its maximum.
cards.flavor_text: The bellow is tuned to a critical frequency - pained howls can crack armor... or a man’s skeleton.

cards.name: Windwalker Camp
cards.card_effect: D: Restore 1 health to target unit from your Citadel.
cards.flavor_text: They tamed the wasteland. Only fitting they would tame the Lilin.

cards.name: Xeno Psychology
cards.card_effect: Your units gain +1 Attack.
cards.flavor_text:
We’re looking at a myconeural network with a far greater magnitude than the human brain. We are the virus here.
-Ranna Myren, Promethea Probe Team

cards.name: Xenophagy
cards.card_effect: This unit gains Consume (If this unit deals lethal combat damage, add one health from the defeated unit.)
